query:
SELECT u.username, u.email
            FROM usr u
            WHERE u.workspace_id = $1
              AND u.disabled = false
              AND u.username = ANY($2::text[])
              AND (
                  u.is_admin = true
                  OR EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1 FROM usr_to_group g
                      WHERE g.workspace_id = $1
                        AND g.group_ = $3
                        AND g.usr = u.username
                  )
              )
